title: The World Is Full Of Double Beds
content:
The world is full of double beds
    And most delightful maidenheads,
    Which being so, there�s no excuse
    For sodomy of self-abuse.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Hilaire Belloc, titled "The World Is Full Of Double Beds", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
